name: kirby-ui
description: The Kirby cluster demo UI: a Nostr client. Subscribes to the cluster's signed Nostr events off a relay and renders them. No backend - the relay is the API.

scripts.relay: echo 'Run a local relay from the kirby-node flake: (cd ../kirby-node && nix run .#relay) - default ws://127.0.0.1:7777'
